---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve, and who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include CLI sketches, API shapes, or config examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art, or external references.
